scripts.build: bun run build:core && bun run build:docs
scripts.check: ultracite check && bun run check:core && bun run check:docs
scripts.check:core: bun run check:core:fmt && bun run check:core:lint
scripts.verify: bun run verify:core && bun run verify:docs
scripts.verify:core: bun run check:core && bun run test:core && bun run build:core && bun run docs:core
scripts.verify:docs: bun run check:docs && bun run build:docs
